title: feat(auth): add OAuth2 support for Google and GitHub
description:
Implemented OAuth2 authentication flow with support for Google and GitHub providers.

- Added OAuth2 client configuration
- Implemented callback handlers
- Added user profile mapping
- Updated login UI with provider buttons

This enables users to sign in using their existing Google or GitHub accounts, improving the onboarding experience.

title: fix(auth): improve session handling and token refresh
description:
Fixed issues with session expiration and implemented automatic token refresh.

- Added token refresh logic
- Improved session storage
- Fixed race condition in auth middleware
- Added better error messages

title: perf(api): optimize database queries and add caching
description:
Improved API performance by optimizing database queries and implementing Redis caching.

- Added query result caching
- Optimized N+1 queries
- Implemented connection pooling
- Added cache invalidation logic

API response times reduced by 60% on average.

title: feat(monitoring): add comprehensive error logging
description:
Implemented structured logging and error tracking throughout the API.

- Added structured JSON logging
- Integrated with error tracking service
- Added request/response logging
- Implemented log aggregation

title: fix(ui): resolve data table sorting issues
description:
Fixed bugs in data table sorting functionality.

- Fixed column sort direction
- Resolved date sorting issues
- Added sort indicators
- Improved sort performance

title: refactor(nav): improve navigation menu accessibility
description:
Redesigned navigation menu for better accessibility and usability.

- Added ARIA labels
- Improved keyboard navigation
- Enhanced mobile responsiveness
- Updated visual hierarchy

title: fix(payments): resolve transaction handling bug
description:
Fixed critical bug in payment transaction processing.

- Fixed race condition in payment flow
- Added transaction rollback logic
- Improved error recovery
- Added comprehensive tests

title: docs(api): update API documentation
description:
Updated API documentation with new endpoints and examples.

- Added OpenAPI specifications
- Updated endpoint descriptions
- Added request/response examples
- Fixed documentation errors

title: test(auth): add comprehensive authentication tests
description:
Added extensive test coverage for authentication system.

- Added unit tests for OAuth2 flow
- Added integration tests
- Added edge case tests
- Improved test fixtures

title: style(ui): update button styles and colors
description:
Updated UI components to match new design system.

- Updated button styles
- Adjusted color palette
- Improved spacing consistency
- Added hover states
